title: How Scripture arms a man before temptation arrives
caption:
God gave you a sword and a manual for how to use it.

Most men know the verse. They just haven't opened it before the moment of pressure. The enemy doesn't announce himself — he shows up in a mood, a notification, a door you forgot you left open.

Knowing the Word before the battle is not optional prep. It's the whole strategy.

One chapter before one notification. Name the pattern before it names you. Confess the sin before it owns you. Cut the route before you're weak enough not to care.

"I have stored up your word in my heart, that I might not sin against you." — Psalm 119:11

Save this for the morning before the temptation you don't see coming.

#faith #christianmen #scripture #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #thework #selfcontrol #christianity #psalm119
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
